tasks.subject: Task 1: Add BROWSER_KILL_PATTERN constant + killBrowserProcesses helper + unit test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce shared module-level surface (constant + helper) and lock in pattern composition with two unit tests. Pre-flight + Tier 2 callsites unchanged (additive only).

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts`
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/killBrowserProcesses.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/killBrowserProcesses.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BROWSER_KILL_PATTERN exported and equals chrome|chromium|firefox|camoufox|playwright|headless_shell", "killBrowserProcesses helper exported with timeoutMs default 5000", "2 unit tests pass", "npm test green", "npm run build green", "pre-flight + Tier 2 callsites unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Refactor pre-flight callsite to use helper + 2s reap delay
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace existing two-call pre-flight pkill block (main.ts:177-191) with single killBrowserProcesses() call + 2-second sleep before cgroup memory read. Update log string.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -n 'pkill' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -n 'pkill' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pre-flight pkill block replaced with killBrowserProcesses() + setTimeout 2000ms", "log line includes engine list", "no pkill strings in pre-flight block", "Tier 2 Phase A unchanged", "npm test green", "npm run build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Refactor Tier 2 Phase A callsite to use helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace inline pkill in handleCriticalMemory (line ~333) with killBrowserProcesses() call. Update log string. No reap delay added (Phase A returns to next watchdog tick = built-in delay).

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -n 'pkill' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -n 'pkill' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Phase A pkill replaced with killBrowserProcesses()", "log says 'browser processes' not 'Chrome/Playwright processes'", "no pkill remains in main.ts", "npm test green", "npm run build green", "operator smoke documented"]}
```
